name: Pecan Pie from the Heart of Georgia
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the sugar and both types of corn syrup; stir in the vanilla and melted butter. Mix in the eggs.
3. Place the pecan pieces at the bottom of the uncooked pie shell.
4. Pour the mixture over the nuts.
5. Bake for 40 - 45 minutes. The top of the pie will be firm.
